channel.title: Blog on Vasile Câmpeanu
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Vasile Câmpeanu

item.title: Markdown Syntax
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme. Headings The following HTML <h1>—<h6> elements represent six levels of section headings. <h1> is the highest section level while <h6> is the lowest. H1 Heading H2 Heading H3 Heading H4 Heading H5 Heading H6 Heading Paragraphs Xerum, quo qui aut unt expliquam qui dolut labo.
